entries: **New "Lepidoptera" panel theme**: a cyanotype blueprint plate inspired by the Fable 5 launch — deep Prussian-blue ground with a cyan engineering grid, the Claude Code and Codex logos mounted in cyan registration frames, monospace engineering readouts, corner crop marks, and white technical line-art butterflies drawn as schematics (construction circles, centerlines, wingspan dimensions) that drift and beat their wings across the panel. Pick it from "Switch Panel". Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`.
